metadata.description: Strategic Thinking. Structure at Scale. Security from Start. AI codes fast — Raven keeps it disciplined: a plan before any edit, challenged from three angles, approved by you; the right specialist for every prompt, 61 routed deterministically, never silently; local hooks that block secrets, vulnerable libraries, and edits until the thinking happened — from the first commit. All on your machine. Zero telemetry. MIT.
